# Empty

Empty state placeholder, displayed when there is no data or content.

## Properties

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED-PROPS:START -->
| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `message` | `string` | No | Placeholder text |
<!-- AUTO-GENERATED-PROPS:END -->

## Example

```json
{ "type": "empty", "message": "No items found." }
```
